rationale: Gov't Code §2001.226 exempts TDCJ rules from the Administrative Procedure Act. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: This chapter does not apply to a rule or internal procedure of the Texas Department of Criminal Justice or Texas Board of Criminal Justice that applies to an inmate or any other person under the custody or control of the department or to an action taken under that rule or procedure.
_note: Rule is entirely unrelated to property tax or homestead exemptions.
